flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Virginia Peninsula Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.9k vs 5.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Virginia Peninsula Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Virginia Peninsula Community College rose 40% between 2006 and 2009 (10.1% → 14.1%).
